an1.616:1.1: "Those *bhikkhus*, *bhikkhus*, who do not partake of *sati* directed to the body do not partake of the deathless.
an1.616:1.2: Those *bhikkhus*, *bhikkhus*, who partake of *sati* directed to the body partake of the deathless."
an1.617:1.1: "The deathless is not enjoyed by those, *bhikkhus*, for whom *sati* directed to the body is not enjoyed.
an1.617:1.2: The deathless is enjoyed by those, *bhikkhus*, for whom *sati* directed to the body is enjoyed."
an1.618:1.1: "The deathless is lost by those, *bhikkhus*, for whom *sati* directed to the body is lost.
an1.618:1.2: The deathless is not lost by those, *bhikkhus*, for whom *sati* directed to the body is not lost."
an1.619:1.1: "The deathless is missed by those, *bhikkhus*, for whom *sati* directed to the body is missed.
an1.619:1.2: The deathless is undertaken by those, *bhikkhus*, for whom *sati* directed to the body is undertaken."
an1.620:1.1: "Those *bhikkhus*, *bhikkhus*, who have been heedless of *sati* directed to the body have been heedless of the deathless.
an1.620:1.2: Those *bhikkhus*, *bhikkhus*, who have not been heedless of *sati* directed to the body have not been heedless of the deathless."
an1.621:1.1: "The deathless is forgotten by those, *bhikkhus*, for whom *sati* directed to the body is forgotten.
an1.621:1.2: The deathless is not forgotten by those, *bhikkhus*, for whom *sati* directed to the body is not forgotten."
an1.622:1.1: "The deathless is not cultivated by those, *bhikkhus*, for whom *sati* directed to the body is not cultivated.
an1.622:1.2: The deathless is cultivated by those, *bhikkhus*, for whom *sati* directed to the body is cultivated."
an1.623:1.1: "The deathless is not developed [*abhāvitaṁ*] by those, *bhikkhus*, for whom *sati* directed to the body is not developed [*abhāvitā*].
an1.623:1.2: The deathless is developed [*bhāvitaṁ*] by those, *bhikkhus*, for whom *sati* directed to the body is developed [*bhāvitā*]."
an1.624:1.1: "The deathless is not made much of by those, *bhikkhus*, for whom *sati* directed to the body is not made much of.
an1.624:1.2: The deathless is made much of by those, *bhikkhus*, for whom *sati* directed to the body is made much of."
an1.625:1.1: "The deathless is not directly known by those, *bhikkhus*, for whom *sati* directed to the body is not directly known.
an1.625:1.2: The deathless is directly known by those, *bhikkhus*, for whom *sati* directed to the body is directly known."
an1.626:1.1: "The deathless is not fully understood by those, *bhikkhus*, for whom *sati* directed to the body is not fully understood.
an1.626:1.2: The deathless is fully understood by those, *bhikkhus*, for whom *sati* directed to the body is fully understood."
an1.627:1.1: "The deathless is not realized by those, *bhikkhus*, for whom *sati* directed to the body is not realized.
an1.627:1.2: The deathless is realized by those, *bhikkhus*, for whom *sati* directed to the body is realized."
an1.627:2.2: Delighted, those *bhikkhus* rejoiced in the *Bhagavā*'s words.
an1.627:2.4: The Book of Ones is complete.
